ogTitle: Piney Range vs Pinnacle: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Piney Range and Pinnacle.
heading: Piney Range vs Pinnacle — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Piney Range, New South Wales and Pinnacle, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pinnacle has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Piney Range (29/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Piney Range or Pinnacle safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Piney Range has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Pinnacle scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Piney Range scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Pinnacle scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Piney Range or Pinnacle?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pinnacle has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
